---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for SystemCare
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
The need or pain point behind the idea.

**Proposed feature**
A clear description of what you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Mockups, examples, or anything else. (Remember: SystemCare stays fully local — no telemetry.)
